data.title: Fresh Del Monte to Acquire Del Monte Foods Assets
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Fresh Del Monte Produce ( (FDP) ).

On February 6, 2026, the U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the District of New Jersey approved an Asset Purchase Agreement under which Fresh Del Monte Produce will acquire Del Monte Foods’ prepared and packaged foods businesses, including canned vegetables, tomato products, refrigerated fruit, the Joyba bubble tea line, several production facilities in the U.S., Mexico and Venezuela, and global ownership of the Del Monte brand subject to existing licenses. The $285 million deal, to be funded with cash on hand and the company’s revolving credit facility, followed a competitive Section 363 bankruptcy auction and, if it closes as expected in the first quarter of 2026 subject to regulatory and customary conditions, would significantly expand Fresh Del Monte’s branded packaged foods footprint and manufacturing base while adding new product categories, though the transaction remains exposed to closing risks such as regulatory approvals, potential adverse business developments and possible termination if deadlines are not met.

The most recent analyst rating on (FDP) stock is a Buy with a $41.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fresh Del Monte Produce stock, see the FDP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FDP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FDP is a Outperform.

The score is primarily supported by strong cash flow generation and a healthier, low-leverage balance sheet. Offsetting factors are thin profitability and mixed momentum signals, while valuation looks only moderately attractive given a mid-20s P/E despite the dividend. Earnings call and recent strategic events are net supportive but tempered by ongoing banana-segment pressures and recent impairments.

To see Spark’s full report on FDP stock, click here.

More about Fresh Del Monte Produce

Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. is a global producer, marketer and distributor of fresh and prepared food products, with a focus on fruits, vegetables and value-added packaged offerings. The company operates across multiple regions and channels, supplying retail, foodservice and industrial customers with branded produce and related food products.

Average Trading Volume: 256,209

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.87B

data.title: Braskem Announces Petrobras Waives Preemptive and Tag-Along Rights in Potential Share Transfer
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Braskem SA ( (BAK) ).

On February 12, 2026, Braskem disclosed that it had been informed by major shareholder Petróleo Brasileiro S.A. – Petrobras about a board decision taken on February 11, 2026, regarding a potential transaction involving Braskem shares held by NSP Investimentos, a Novonor subsidiary, to be transferred to Shine I FIDC. Petrobras’ board approved that the company will not exercise its preemptive and tag-along rights under the current Braskem shareholders’ agreement for this potential deal and authorized its executive board to take the necessary measures to implement that stance.

The decision signals Petrobras’ willingness to allow a reshuffling of Braskem’s shareholder base without asserting its contractual protections at this stage, which could facilitate Novonor’s efforts to advance the contemplated transaction and potentially alter Braskem’s governance dynamics over time. Braskem stated it will continue to inform the market of any material developments related to the proposed share transfer, underscoring ongoing uncertainty for investors around the final terms and implications of the transaction.

The most recent analyst rating on (BAK) stock is a Hold with a $3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Braskem SA stock, see the BAK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BAK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BAK is a Neutral.

Braskem SA’s overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges, with high leverage and declining profitability being the most critical factors. While there are some positive aspects, such as improved EBITDA and liquidity, these are overshadowed by ongoing industry pressures and valuation concerns. Technical analysis provides a neutral outlook, with mixed signals on momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on BAK stock, click here.

More about Braskem SA

Braskem S.A. is a publicly held Brazilian petrochemical company headquartered in Camaçari, Bahia, and listed on B3, the NYSE and Latibex. It operates in the chemical and petrochemical industry, producing resins and other petrochemical products that serve industrial and consumer markets in Brazil and abroad.

Average Trading Volume: 1,183,331

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.54B

Learn more about BAK stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Green Circle Decarbonize Technology Limited ( (GCDT) ) has provided an announcement.

Green Circle Decarbonize Technology Limited, a Cayman Islands holding company listed on the NYSE under the ticker GCDT, focuses on phase change material-based thermal energy storage systems for cooling and heating, delivered via its Hong Kong subsidiary. Its offerings target customers seeking advanced energy-saving solutions supported by proprietary materials and engineering expertise.

On January 13, 2026, Green Circle completed its initial public offering of 2.5 million ordinary shares, and on February 12, 2026 it closed the underwriter’s over-allotment option by selling an additional 375,000 shares at $4.00 each. The full take-up of the over-allotment lifted total gross proceeds from the IPO to about $11.5 million before expenses, strengthening the company’s capital base as it seeks to expand its position in the thermal energy storage and decarbonization technology market.

More about Green Circle Decarbonize Technology Limited

data.title: FVCBankcorp Completes $25 Million Senior Notes Offering
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

FVCBankcorp ( (FVCB) ) has shared an announcement.

On February 11, 2026, FVCBankcorp, Inc. completed a private placement of $25 million in fixed-rate senior unsecured notes due March 1, 2029, sold to qualified institutional buyers and institutional accredited investors. The notes carry a 6.75% annual coupon, pay interest semi-annually, are not convertible, and rank pari passu with the company’s other senior unsecured debt while remaining effectively subordinated to any secured obligations.

The notes may be redeemed at par plus accrued interest starting March 1, 2028, or earlier upon certain tax or regulatory risks, and include covenants restricting the disposition and encumbrance of voting stock in key subsidiaries, as well as cross-default and cross-acceleration provisions tied to other material indebtedness. FVCBankcorp intends to use the proceeds for general corporate purposes, including bolstering capital ratios at FVCbank, a move that enhances regulatory capital flexibility and supports the bank’s capacity to sustain loan growth and manage risk in its core Washington, D.C. market.

The most recent analyst rating on (FVCB) stock is a Buy with a $18.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on FVCBankcorp stock, see the FVCB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FVCB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FVCB is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by mixed financial quality—balance-sheet deleveraging and multi-year revenue growth are positives, but profitability volatility and a problematic (or missing) 2025 cash-flow picture are significant risks. Technically the stock trends positively above key moving averages with bullish MACD, while valuation is reasonable on earnings but offers limited dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on FVCB stock, click here.

More about FVCBankcorp

FVCBankcorp, Inc. is a bank holding company for FVCbank, operating in the financial services industry with a focus on commercial and retail banking. The company concentrates its business in and around the Washington, D.C. metropolitan area, providing loans, deposits and other banking services to businesses and consumers in this government- and service-oriented market.

The bank’s operations are exposed to regional economic, political and regulatory conditions, including federal spending trends and interest-rate movements. Its balance sheet and capital management strategy rely on access to capital markets and the prudent use of senior and subordinated debt to support lending growth, liquidity and regulatory capital requirements at the bank subsidiary level.

Average Trading Volume: 41,212

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $285.4M

data.title: Maris-Tech Wins U.S. Pilot Contract for AI-Driven Infantry Fighting Vehicle Upgrade
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Maris-Tech Ltd. ( (MTEK) ) is now available.

On February 12, 2026, Maris-Tech Ltd. announced it has been awarded a pilot contract by a U.S. customer to support an Infantry Fighting Vehicle modernization program with its AI-based edge computing systems. The pilot will combine the company’s Diamond Ultra situational awareness platform and Peridot Night panoramic day and thermal imaging system to give crews a unified, real-time 360° operational picture for both the vehicle and its weapon system.

The solution fuses multiple day and thermal sensors at the vehicle edge, enabling real-time detection of ground and aerial threats and allowing upgrades to existing and next-generation vehicles without major structural changes. Management says this pilot underscores growing opportunities in vehicle modernization programs and could pave the way for broader adoption of Maris-Tech’s technologies as armed forces enhance their fleets, potentially strengthening the company’s position in the defense AI and video intelligence market.

data.title: Eco Wave Power Posts Robust January Wave Output at Jaffa Port as Global Project Pipeline Expands
data.description:

Eco Wave Power Global ( (WAVE) ) has issued an announcement.

On February 12, 2026, Eco Wave Power Global reported that its EWP-EDF One pilot system at Jaffa Port, Israel, delivered continued strong and stable wave energy production in January 2026, generating more than 2,300 kWh of renewable electricity over about 11 days of 1–2 meter waves. The installation has recorded zero downtime since early 2025, reinforcing the robustness of the technology and its ability to operate reliably in moderate sea conditions while supplying valuable data for scaling up.

The Jaffa Port project, a limited array of small floaters, is designed to validate continuous operation, durability and real-world performance rather than maximize output, and January’s results are being used to refine future commercial deployments with larger floaters and more units. Alongside this pilot, Eco Wave Power is broadening its global footprint with an operational project at AltaSea in the Port of Los Angeles and advancing developments in Taiwan, India and Portugal, strengthening its position in the emerging wave energy segment and signaling growing momentum for wave power within the broader renewable mix.

The most recent analyst rating on (WAVE) stock is a Hold with a $4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Eco Wave Power Global stock, see the WAVE Stock Forecast page.

data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Ardmore Shipping ( (ASC) ) has provided an announcement.

Ardmore Shipping reported net income attributable to common stockholders of $9.3 million for the fourth quarter of 2025 and $36.1 million for the full year, with adjusted earnings of $11.6 million and $38.8 million respectively, reflecting solid quarterly performance but a sharp earnings decline versus 2024 when results were boosted by vessel sale gains. The Board declared a $0.09 per-share dividend for the quarter ended December 31, 2025, and the company highlighted stronger spot TCE rates going into early 2026, increased time-charter coverage, completion of its drydocking program, and the full redemption of its Series A preferred stock, positioning Ardmore to benefit from firm tanker markets amid ongoing geopolitical disruptions to global trade.

MR tankers earned an average spot TCE of $25,257 per day and chemical tankers $19,948 per day in the fourth quarter of 2025, with early first-quarter 2026 fixtures indicating higher MR rates and slightly improved chemical tanker rates on partially fixed revenue days. As of December 31, 2025 Ardmore operated 26 vessels, and management emphasized that structural and geopolitical drivers—ranging from the Russia-Ukraine conflict to Red Sea disruptions—are supporting tanker demand and rate strength, even as broader economic and trade-policy uncertainty continues to cloud the long-term operating environment.

The board decided Petrobras will not exercise its preemptive and tag-along rights under the current Braskem shareholders’ agreement and authorized the executive board to take the steps needed to implement this stance.

data.title: Franco-Nevada to Acquire $250 Million Nevada Gold Royalty from i-80 Gold
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Franco-Nevada ( (TSE:FNV) ) has shared an update.

On February 12, 2026, Franco-Nevada announced an agreement, via a U.S. subsidiary, to acquire a $250 million net smelter return royalty from i-80 Gold Corp. to support i-80 Gold’s recapitalization and its plan to build a Nevada-focused mid-tier gold producer. The royalty, starting at 1.5% and rising to 3.0% in 2031, will cover all of i-80 Gold’s key Nevada properties, including six projects spanning more than 250 km² and a total resource base of 7.8 Moz AuEq measured and indicated and 8.6 Moz AuEq inferred.

The financing underpins i-80 Gold’s three-phase development plan, expected to lift production from 30–40 koz of gold in 2025 to more than 600 koz annually after 2032, and will help refurbish the Lone Tree autoclave as a central processing hub. Franco-Nevada, which intends to fund the deal from its existing cash and capital resources, further deepens its gold royalty exposure in Nevada, secures a right of first offer on future i-80 streams and royalties, and positions itself to benefit from the growth of what it believes could become one of the largest gold operations in the state.

data.title: FST Corp. Reveals Higher Leverage and Shrinking Equity in Unaudited 2025 Results
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from FST Corp ( (KBSX) ).

On February 11, 2026, FST Corp. filed a Form 6‑K announcing the release of its unaudited condensed consolidated financial statements and management discussion and analysis for the year ended December 31, 2025. The filing shows total assets of $59.8 million versus $58.6 million a year earlier, alongside a substantial rise in total liabilities to $50.3 million and a marked drop in total equity to $9.5 million, reflecting higher bank borrowings, new derivative and warrant liabilities, and negative retained earnings.

The disclosure highlights that current liabilities climbed sharply, driven by increased short‑term bank loans, higher payables and accrued expenses, and recognition of an OET derivative liability, signaling greater leverage and financial obligations entering 2026. For stakeholders, the shift from positive retained earnings to an accumulated deficit and the emergence of a share subscription receivable and treasury stock underscore growing balance‑sheet pressure despite revenue growth, making the 2025 results a key reference point for assessing FST Corp.’s risk profile and capital structure.

data.title: Satellos Bioscience Doses First Patient in Phase 2 Pediatric Duchenne Study of SAT-3247
data.description:
Valentine's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Satellos Bioscience ( (TSE:MSCL) ) has shared an update.

On February 12, 2026, Satellos Bioscience announced that it has dosed the first participant in BASECAMP, a three-month, randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled Phase 2 pediatric trial of SAT-3247 in ambulatory boys aged 7 to 9 with Duchenne muscular dystrophy. The study will enroll 51 children and is designed to assess safety, tolerability and effects on muscle force, while secondary measures will examine muscle quality, function and regeneration.

Positioned as a potential pivotal trial, BASECAMP is being run across up to 25 sites in the U.S., Europe, the U.K., Australia, Canada and Serbia, underscoring Satellos’s global ambitions in Duchenne therapy. The launch of this proof-of-concept study represents a significant operational milestone, potentially strengthening the company’s competitive stance in degenerative muscle disease drug development and signaling progress for stakeholders seeking novel treatments beyond existing limited options.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MSCL) stock is a Buy with a C$16.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Satellos Bioscience stock, see the TSE:MSCL Stock Forecast page.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (pre-revenue, large losses, and heavy cash burn with ongoing funding risk). To see Spark’s full report on TSE:MSCL stock, click here.

More about Satellos Bioscience

Satellos Bioscience Inc. is a Toronto-based, clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing small molecule drugs that restore natural muscle repair and regeneration in degenerative muscle diseases. Its lead candidate, SAT-3247, is an orally administered AAK1-targeting therapy in development as a potential disease-modifying treatment for Duchenne muscular dystrophy and other muscle disorders.
